center.name: Caramoan National Park
center.summary: Caramoan National Park是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Rufous-breasted blue flycatcher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Prior to 2025, this species was listed as a vulnerable species. It is found in the protected areas in Bulusan Volcano Natural Park, Caramoan National Park and Mount Isarog but actual protection from deforestation is lax
